problem id: 3f1b05f3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  00101001 -> 10010000
  11101000 -> 10000011
  00010010 -> 00100000
  00011101 -> 11010000
  01001001 -> 10010001
  11000101 -> 01010011
  10110001 -> 00010010
  11111000 -> 10000011
  10110010 -> 00100010

query: 11011110
predicted answer: 11100011
